Description: Draft feature for turning similarity signals into per-day photo clusters.

Stories.StoryDescription: Select the algorithm and thresholds used to group similar shots within one day.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: A per-day clustering approach is defined and configurable.

Stories.StoryDescription: Assign each accepted photo to a cluster for later ranking and de-duplication.
Stories.AcceptanceCriteria: Accepted photos receive deterministic cluster assignments.
